mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_rooms (type, title, created_by) VALUES (#{type}, #{title}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id FROM chat_rooms r JOIN chat_room_members m1 ON m1.room_id = r.id AND m1.user_id = #{userA} JOIN chat_room_members m2 ON m2.room_id = r.id AND m2.user_id = #{userB} WHERE r.type = 'DIRECT' AND (SELECT count(*) FROM chat_room_members m WHERE m.room_id = r.id) = 2 LIMIT 1
SELECT u.* FROM chat_room_members m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.user_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY u.nickname

SELECT r.id AS room_id, r.type AS room_type, CASE WHEN r.type = 'GROUP' THEN COALESCE(r.title, '그룹채팅') ELSE COALESCE(other.nickname, '(상대방 없음)') END AS display_title, CASE WHEN r.type = 'GROUP' THEN NULL ELSE other.profile_image_url END AS display_profile_image_url, lm.id AS last_message_id, LEFT(lm.content, 100) AS last_message_preview, lm.created_at AS last_message_at, COALESCE(unread.cnt, 0) AS unread_count FROM chat_room_members me JOIN chat_rooms r ON r.id = me.room_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT u.nickname, u.profile_image_url FROM chat_room_members mm JOIN users u ON u.id = mm.user_id WHERE mm.room_id = r.id AND mm.user_id <> #{userId} LIMIT 1 ) other ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT m.id, m.content, m.created_at FROM messages m WHERE m.room_id = r.id ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) lm ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT count(*) AS cnt FROM messages m WHERE m.room_id = r.id AND m.id > COALESCE(me.last_read_message_id, 0) AND m.sender_id <> me.user_id ) unread ON TRUE WHERE me.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY lm.created_at DESC NULLS LAST
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_room_members WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND user_id = #{userId}
